message:
test(readme): Arrow IPC stream round-trip coverage

README §147 / line 150 documents read_ipc_stream_bytes /
write_ipc_stream_bytes as first-class IO surface — explicitly called
out as the only Arrow IPC format reachable via standalone functions
rather than DataFrameIoExt extension methods.

Both have been in the prelude since fd90.125 but had zero integration
test coverage. Adds readme_ipc_stream_round_trip — reachable via
prelude alone — that:

- Builds a 3-row mixed-type DataFrame from CSV (ticker / price / volume)
- write_ipc_stream_bytes(&df) → Vec<u8> (streaming format)
- read_ipc_stream_bytes(&bytes) → DataFrame
- Asserts shape preservation (index len + column names) and spot-checks
  a Float64 value to prove it's real data, not just shape

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.21.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
